raw_consumer_statement:
I applied recently for an apartment as I have been at my current residence for 9 and 1/2 years. When the credit portion came back it shows that I have over 30 inquiries in my name in the last 2 years. A few accounts that were opened in my name in a different city. Immediately finding this out yesterday I went to all the bureaus and sites and I put fraud alerts as well as freezing my credit on all bureaus and making a police report on the fraudulently opened accounts in my name. 

XXXX/cbna w a balance in amount of {$1400.00}. Date of Delinquency shows on XXXX only as XX/XX/XXXX. Originally account was opened on XX/XX/XXXX. Since the issue occured both XXXX and XXXX fixed this mistake but for some reason on XXXX it still showing as owed. 

I also reached out to the creditor an since nothing has happened. This is definitely damaging my credit because I do not have much credit as I had identity theft in the past 10 years. I would love this to be removed so I can apply for an apartment thank you.
